text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Phew... My strength was... slightly insufficient.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I must address that slight deficiency before the next race.
choice_data_list: We both have to work even harder...
We both have to work even harder...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I must address that slight deficiency before the next race.
choice_data_list: We both have to work even harder...
We both have to work even harder...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I believe I was able to utilize my current
capabilities to the fullest today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That said, my sights are set on the highest of
heights, and unless I improve, those shall remain
out of reach.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I ask for your continued guidance, so we can
make today's slight insufficiency slighter still.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I shall remember every detail of this sensation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I expect this feeling will serve as my next source
of encouragement.
